description: An illustration showing a young man in black embracing a pale young woman lying on a bier adorned with red flower garlands in a vaulted stone crypt. Tall candles burn at the corners of the bier. In the background, arched columns lead to steps, and religious imagery is faintly visible on the walls. Text at the bottom reads in Czech, and the caption reads 'ROMEO A JULIE'. The style is detailed and romantic with soft, muted colors.
